summary: Frontend testing COMPLETE for Style dropdown restoration, FloatingToolbar cleanup (4 buttons), and Undo/Redo for draw mode. All requested features verified working.

style_dropdown_in_toolbar.button_visible: PASS - data-testid='style-dropdown-btn' visible when zone selected in edit mode
style_dropdown_in_toolbar.stroke_style_options: PASS - Solid (متصل), Dashed (مقطع), Dotted (نقطي) options present
style_dropdown_in_toolbar.preview_shape: PASS - Preview rectangle displayed at bottom of dropdown

floating_toolbar.appears_on_zone_select: PASS - data-testid='floating-toolbar' appears when zone clicked in edit mode
floating_toolbar.has_4_buttons: PASS - Floating toolbar contains exactly 4 buttons

draw_mode_undo_redo.access_via_shapes_panel: PASS - نقطة بنقطة (point-by-point) accessible via shapes dropdown
draw_mode_undo_redo.drawing_layer_visible: PASS - data-testid='drawing-layer' appears after adding points
draw_mode_undo_redo.undo_button: PASS - data-testid='drawing-undo-btn' visible with تراجع label
draw_mode_undo_redo.redo_button: PASS - data-testid='drawing-redo-btn' visible with إعادة label
draw_mode_undo_redo.clear_button: PASS - data-testid='drawing-clear-btn' visible with مسح label
draw_mode_undo_redo.save_button: PASS - data-testid='drawing-save-btn' visible with حفظ label (when >=3 points)
draw_mode_undo_redo.undo_multi_step: PASS - Undo works multiple times (tested 2 consecutive undos)
draw_mode_undo_redo.redo_multi_step: PASS - Redo works multiple times (tested 2 consecutive redos)
draw_mode_undo_redo.clear_works: PASS - Clear button clears all drawing points

other_features.shapes_panel: PASS - All 10 basic shapes + 2 freehand options available
other_features.changes_log: PASS - سجل التغييرات section present at bottom
other_features.edit_mode_instruction: PASS - Shows 'دبل كلك على نقطة لحذفها' (double-click to delete point)

critical_code_review_comments: Style dropdown (تنسيق) correctly implemented in MapToolbar.jsx at lines 233-302
Style dropdown only shows when selectedZoneId is set - correct conditional rendering
FloatingToolbar in MapCanvas.jsx correctly has 4 buttons (color button removed)
Undo/Redo implemented with undoStack and redoStack state in DailySessionsPage.jsx
addDrawingPoint function correctly pushes to undoStack before adding new point
undoDrawing/redoDrawing/clearDrawing callbacks properly manage undo/redo stacks
seed_data_creation: None - using existing sessions on Feb 18/19
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 tested: 1) Style dropdown (تنسيق) restored to main toolbar with fill color, opacity, stroke color, stroke width, stroke style (solid/dashed/dotted) and preview - only visible when zone selected in edit mode. 2) FloatingToolbar has exactly 4 buttons: float-edit-btn, float-copy-btn, float-smooth-btn, float-remove-btn - color button REMOVED. 3) Draw mode (via shapes panel -> نقطة بنقطة) has multi-step Undo/Redo with drawing-undo-btn and drawing-redo-btn. Uses undoStack and redoStack for history. All tests passed on Feb 19 session with 60 zones.
